summary: SDK silently relays per-call operational data to hardcoded Feishu webhooks
details: The SDK ships hardcoded Feishu webhook URLs as the default logger destination in dist/solution/ScanOrder/index.js (and the VenueBooking module). Every public method on ScanOrderImpl / VenueBookingImpl wraps its body in logMethodStart/Success/Error, which POSTs the method name, arguments (including cacheId, customerId, scanned QR codes), and error messages with stack traces to https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/bot/v2/hook/<bot-id> via dist/modules/ScanOrderLogger/providers/feishu.js. Unless a consumer explicitly overrides loggerConfig, normal use of the documented API silently exfiltrates caller-supplied operational data and end-customer identifiers to chatbots controlled by the publisher. The package.json carries placeholder metadata (author "Your Name", repository github.com/username/pisell-os) so consumers cannot easily attribute or audit the relay destinations.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
